Issue Summary: html lang="en" — if the page content is Korean the lang attribute should be "ko"
Recommendation: Set lang attribute to match the primary language of the page content.

Issue Summary: img element missing alt attribute
Recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute (or alt="" if decorative).

Issue Summary: innerHTML used to inject user-supplied content without sanitization — potential for injecting inaccessible content
Recommendation: Use textContent instead of innerHTML to prevent injection of arbitrary DOM that may lack accessibility semantics.

Issue Summary: Icon-only button with SVG has no accessible name (missing aria-label or screen-reader text)
Recommendation: Add aria-label describing the button purpose (e.g. aria-label="Settings").

Issue Summary: Icon-only button with SVG has no accessible name (missing aria-label or screen-reader text)
Recommendation: Add aria-label describing the button purpose.

Issue Summary: SVG element lacks role="img" and title/aria-label
Recommendation: Add role="img" and a <title> element inside SVG or aria-label on the SVG.

Issue Summary: SVG element lacks role="img" and title/aria-label
Recommendation: Add role="img" and a <title> element inside SVG or aria-label on the SVG.

Issue Summary: Image alt text "Promo" is insufficiently descriptive
Recommendation: Provide a meaningful alt text that describes the image content or purpose.

Issue Summary: div with onClick handler is not keyboard accessible — no onKeyDown/onKeyPress and no role or tabIndex
Recommendation: Add role="button" tabIndex={0} and an onKeyDown handler (Enter/Space) or use a <button> element.

Issue Summary: Clickable div lacks focus indicator styling
Recommendation: Ensure the clickable element has a visible focus outline (e.g. focus:outline or focus-visible styles).

KWCAG2.2 Guideline: 7.4.1 (Role and Properties of User Interface Components)
Issue Summary: Clickable div missing ARIA role — screen readers cannot identify it as interactive
Recommendation: Add role="button" or replace with a semantic <button> element.

Issue Summary: Duplicate id="card-item" when Card is rendered multiple times — IDs must be unique
Recommendation: Use a dynamic unique ID (e.g. based on title or index) or remove the static id.

Issue Summary: Page has only h1 with no subheadings — heading hierarchy may be incomplete
Recommendation: Ensure a logical heading hierarchy (h1 > h2 > h3) to aid screen reader navigation.

Issue Summary: List items rendered without key prop — may cause unstable rendering and confuse assistive technology
Recommendation: Add a unique key prop to each mapped element.

Issue Summary: Page body lacks landmark regions (no <main> or <nav>)
Recommendation: Wrap page content in semantic landmark elements such as <main> and <nav>.

Issue Summary: Link text "About Us" is clear but page has no skip navigation link
Recommendation: Add a skip-to-content link at the top of the page for keyboard users.

Issue Summary: Dynamic content injected after 500ms delay without notifying assistive technology
Recommendation: Use aria-live="polite" on the container so screen readers announce new content.

Issue Summary: onClick on div without keyboard support means keyboard/switch users cannot activate the card
Recommendation: Provide equivalent keyboard interaction or use a native interactive element.

Issue Summary: Image missing explicit width/height — may cause layout shift affecting users with cognitive disabilities
Recommendation: Add width and height attributes to prevent content layout shifts.

Issue Summary: Inline script in body without defer/async blocks parsing and may affect assistive technology loading
Recommendation: Move script to end of body or use defer attribute.
